text.title: Paid Trial Task Library Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Paid Trial Task Library methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-task
step.action: Define one tangible deliverable bounded to <=8h.

step.name: set-payout
step.action: Set payout >= local market rate * time-box; never zero.

step.name: write-rubric
step.decision-gate: If any criterion lacks anchors, rewrite.

step.name: safety-check
step.action: Confirm task uses synthetic or scoped data; reject repo-wide access.

step.name: publish-and-version
step.action: Add to the library with semver; old versions retained for audit.
